<!-- Order is fixed per git-hygiene. Delete nothing; write "none" instead. -->

## What

One paragraph.

## Why

Motivation or linked issue. Closes #NN.

## How verified

Tests added/run, manual checks performed. A PR that changes behavior includes
the tests that prove it; a PR without tests states why here.

## Found but not fixed

Refactoring candidates / bugs spotted, or "none". (These also belong in the
triage backlog if this PR came through the pipeline.)

## DESTRUCTIVE or security-relevant

Migrations, auth, secrets handling, data changes. State it prominently or
write "none". If not "none": André's explicit approval is recorded where?
